pr_description:
As mentioned in #95, we wouldn't like to remove deprecated design systems. We prefer to add deprecation label/infobox instead of removing them.

Additionally, this PR adds scroll-to-top strategy if routing change.
commit_message: #95 - Adds label and infobox for deprecated DSs. Adds scroll-to-top behaviour if routing'd change
